picks.title: Free Comic Book Day at Saratoga Library
picks.why: Free Comic Book Day is a national event; Saratoga Library kicks off May with comics for all ages.

picks.title: La Traviata
picks.why: Opera San José's season finale La Traviata [Fri, May 1 7:30 PM] brings Verdi's tragedy to local stages.

picks.title: Les Miserables (Touring)
picks.venue: San Jose Center for the Performing Arts
picks.why: Les Misérables touring production [Sat, May 2 2:00 PM] is a rare Broadway-caliber show in San Jose.

picks.title: South Bay Dance Center presents New Beginnings
picks.why: South Bay Dance Center's spring showcase [Sun, May 3 12:30 PM] features local dancers in an annual May tradition.

picks.title: Hellyer County Park BioBlitz
picks.why: Hellyer County Park BioBlitz [Sat, May 2 9:00 AM] combines nature walk with citizen science—free and seasonal.
